title: fumaria dubia
intro: Fumaria dubia, also known as lesser fumitory, is a flowering plant in the family Fumariaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiviral activities. The plant is believed to have several health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and acting as an antioxidant. Fumaria dubia can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or extracts, and it has been used in traditional folk medicine to treat various ailments.
